assertions.description: INCORRECT: Capacitors C1 and C2 have value '104', which is standard EIA capacitor code for 100 nF (10 × 10^4 pF). The analyzer parses this as 1.04e-10 F (104 pF), yielding a calculated self-resonant frequency of ~494 MHz — more than 30x too high. This causes the decoupling analysis for V_CONTROL rail to show total_capacitance_uF=0.0 (essentially zero) and 'has_bypass: false', which is incorrect. The actual capacitance is 0.2 uF (200 nF) across the two caps.
